SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALBERT LEE MITCHELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MITCHELL, ALBERT LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. $475.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
